problem id: 4ccf511a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01110101 -> 01000111
  11010001 -> 01001101
  00010001 -> 11001101
  11111100 -> 11001111
  00010101 -> 10000101
  11100000 -> 00111111
  01000101 -> 00100101
  00000000 -> 11111111
  01000111 -> 00000101

query: 00001110
predicted answer: 00000011
